name: First Command
description_short: First Command is a free credit assistance provider based in San Diego, California. Rated 5.0/5 with 30 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
First Command is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in San Diego, California. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 30 reviews, First Command has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the San Diego area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a bank, insurance agency, First Command provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in San Diego offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. First Command provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the San Diego, California area who are considering First Command should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
